name: Super Ninja Hero VR
short_description: "super ninja hero vr"is a VR-FPS game(first-person shooting game) that developed by Wuhan Firegame Co.,Ltd..Variety of scenes with cool fighting, strong cunning enemies and smart BOSS.Taking up your arms to begin a legend.
detailed_description:
Update Notes

Super ninja hero VR is now support the Oculus -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- Super ninja hero VR is now support Oculus Rift, picking up your Touch and join the team! Melee weapons - Ninja blade come to the game.Defense with a casual smile and attack as aggreesive as fire .The road of hero, more exciting.


About the Game

Hero, you are not alone! "super ninja hero vr" is a VR-FPS game(first-person shooting game) that developed by Wuhan Firegame Co.,Ltd..Variety of scenes with cool fighting, strong cunning enemies and smart boss.Taking up your arms to begin a legend. --Weapon: Hidden blade:suitable for beginners,simple and crude. Aim at the enemy, pulling the trigger and biu biu biu.... Bow:Completely imitate true archery,enjoying the pleasure of slay. --Battle: Flight with claw? Yes Fight face-to-face?Yes Escape by a walk?Yes Shoot behind barrier?Yes --Enemies: Brutal Shadow Evil and sexy Tengu is waiting for you with a team of minions in their secret base. So Are you ready? For more enjoyment,join us.
